column2: 1. About how much time do you spend daily on short-form content (like reels, shorts, quick scrolling)?
column3:
Enter your average daily screen time (in hours)
To check your screen time:
Android: Go to Settings → Digital Wellbeing & Parental Controls → Dashboard
iPhone: Go to Settings → Screen Time → See All Activity
column4: What is your primary form of content consumed?
column5: Do you engage with any digital content within 30 minutes before sleep?
column6: How often do you switch between apps/tasks while using your device?
column7: How often do you take intentional breaks during screen usage?
column8: What is your average sleep duration?
column9: Rate your ability to maintain focus on a single task (1–10)
column10: How often do you feel mentally fatigued during the day?
column11: How easily do you get distracted while working/studying?
column12: After periods of high screen usage, how does your concentration change?
